notes: Country-level VIZA RAG seed for morocco. This file is the source of truth for this country's visitor/tourism visa knowledge and is designed to evolve alongside the country-specific form-filling workflow.

chunks.title: Chinese passport tourism route for Morocco
chunks.content: For Chinese ordinary passport holders planning short tourism travel to Morocco, VIZA AI should consider the visa-free short-stay route when eligible, otherwise Morocco eVisa or consular visa route. First confirm nationality, stay length, purpose, passport validity, accommodation and whether the stay exceeds the short-stay limit. Do not promise visa-free entry without checking nationality and current Moroccan rules. Keep advice limited to tourism/visitor travel unless the user states work, study, residence, immigration, journalism, volunteering or another regulated purpose.

chunks.title: Morocco formalities and Acces Maroc
chunks.content: Moroccan tourism formalities guidance says foreign nationals arriving as part of an organised trip need a valid passport covering at least the duration of stay. Morocco also provides Acces Maroc for submitting and tracking e-Visa or AEVM electronic travel authorization applications. Moroccan consular guidance explains short-stay visas generally cover one to ninety days, and possession of a visa does not create an irrevocable right of entry.

chunks.title: Morocco entry checks and overstay caution
chunks.content: For Morocco, VIZA AI should collect destination cities, accommodation, return/onward ticket, funds and intended length of stay. Warn users not to rely on repeated border runs or assumptions about resetting stays; if staying longer than the visa-free/short-stay period, they should check Moroccan consular/residence rules before travel.

documents.title: Morocco Application Form and Document Intake Requirements

chunks.title: Morocco application channel and form scope
chunks.content: Acces Maroc / Moroccan eVisa or consular route Official source URLs reviewed for this seed: https://www.acces-maroc.ma/ ; https://www.visitmorocco.com/en/formalities. This RAG chunk is for visitor/tourism-oriented intake and form-filling preparation; route work, study, residence, immigration, journalism or other regulated purposes to a separate country workflow.

chunks.title: Morocco fields to collect before filling the form
chunks.content: identity, passport, nationality/residence, travel purpose, stay length, accommodation, contact details and prior visa/residence evidence where applicable

chunks.title: Morocco supporting documents and review checklist
chunks.content: passport, photo, itinerary/accommodation, funds/host evidence, return/onward ticket and any eligibility visa/residence documents Workflow guardrails: VIZA should separate eligibility check, form filling, document upload, payment and post-approval travel/entry checks. Do not guarantee entry; border authorities make the final decision.
